products.title: Orange ZANG (Fems)
products.body_html:
10 feminized seeds per pack.
Orange ZANG
(Tangie x Cap Size)
Tangie (California Orange x Skink-1)
Cap Size (Vice Grip x Dirty Bird)

Tangie is a cross of California Orange, an even sativa/indica hybrid, and a Skunk strain, while Tangerine Dream is a combo of A5 and the legendary G-13. Though they don't share many genes, the two Tangerines share a strong, sweet flavor reminiscent of tangerines and other citrus fruits. Tangie is sativa-heavy, and though the exact ratio of sativa to indica is unclear, it's probably at least 70:30. That means an uplifting cerebral high with enhanced creativity and euphoria, plus a focused boost of happiness. It's good for treating several disorders, though specifics are hard to come by: nausea, anxiety, lack of appetite, and depression. The only widely reported problems are bloodshot eyes and dry mouth, so this may be a good choice for patients sensitive to side effects. Maximum THC levels of more than 22% make this a potent choice for patients who have been smoking marijuana for some time; it may be overpowering for first-timers. Look for Tangie in Colorado and Arizona, and on the West Coast.

products.title: Incredible Power
products.body_html:
7 regular seeds per pack.

Incredible Power is an indica dominant hybrid (75% indica/25% sativa) strain bred specifically to be a part of Sin City's high CBD line. This bud is the child of a three-way cross of CBD heavy strains – AC/DC X Omrita X Blue Power. Incredible Power is infamous for its rare and highly medicinal 1:1 THC:CBD ratio that typically hits at about 12% on average for both. This bud is best used at night because of its relaxing and sedative powers and is ideal for all levels of users, from experienced to novice. The high starts with a slowly building euphoric head high that leaves you happy and relaxed in both mind and body. This tingly head high will slowly spread throughout the rest of your body, leaving you completely at ease with a sedated and sleepy effect. Many users will fall into a deep and peaceful sleep as the high continues. These effects and its medicinal properties make Incredible Power ideal to treat all sorts of conditions, including inflammation, chronic pain, muscle spasms, tremors, migraines, mood swings, and insomnia. Incredible Power has a delicious fresh floral grassy aroma that has a hint of earthy woodiness as the nugs are smoked. The flavor is very similar, with a fresh taste of lemongrass and pine that is accented by sweet earth. These nugs have small and chunky forest green nugs with lots of dark orange hairs and a thick coating of sweet sticky resin.

products.title: Cocoa Chem
products.body_html:
3 feminized auto-flower seeds per pack.

“This line of regs was developed from my line of Chem 91 x Chemdogging autos that I have been working on for a few years. The F2 generation provided a whole range of flavors that was just too good to ignore! To prevent genetic bottlenecks and to better the available autoflower gene pool I’ve decided to put out a regular auto seeds from a few of my favorite expressions so that they can be worked further or used to create new auto x auto and photo x auto crosses. Out of around 300 seeds I selected 12 plants to move forward, nine females and three males. All three males were resinous and terpy, and every plant had exceptional vigor. These were some of the dankest plants I’ve ever had the pleasure of growing, and the Chem 91 input continues to impress! Chem 91 is a backbone of the photoperiod world, something that has truly stood the test of hype and time, and I hope that these regular offerings will have the same impact on the auto world!

Cocoa Chem F3 was a tricky one for me to pin down. I couldn’t quite figure what the dark dankness I was smelling was until someone else smelled it. “”That’s chocolate!”” After that it was clear, dark bittersweet cocoa and coffee flavors collide with Chemmy goodness. A unique heavy smoke unlike anything I’ve encountered before. Definitely a rare treat!”

products.title: Cookies and Creamix
products.body_html:
3 feminized autoflower seeds per pack

If you’ve grown any of my Stomper work then you already know the blizzards that she produces, and the Royal Stomper Remix used for this cross were no exception! Whiter than white flowers that put out incredible creamy grape and blue fruit flavors. The Crinkled Cookies reversal was extremely dense and reeked of doughy grape cookie goodness!

50/50 Sativa/Indica

70-80 Days from Sprout

2-4 ounce average

Expect medium plants with sturdy branching holding dense spear shaped buds that are caked in frost! There are two main expressions that popped up in these. One is a penetrating piney blueberry plant that you can feel in your head almost immediately, while the other has a fuel soaked grape Tyrone Stomper-esque profile that is much more of a body hitter. They are both exceptional in their own ways with the piney variants lending themselves to creative endeavors and overcoming mental exhaustion, and the grapey ones being great for a feel good break from physical exhaustion. When I work these further I will try to isolate each expression down it’s own path, but as for now they are intertwined.

There will be some phenos that express what I’ve been calling a “blockhead” bud shape on their top cola. This is a trait carried through in all of the Crinkled Cookies crosses from the original Grape Crinkle F4 mom. This tends to bring along a slightly more uplifting effect than her rounder sisters.

products.title: Roswell Cookies
products.body_html:
3 feminized autoflower seeds per pack

This one is destined to be a legend. A menage of out of this world heavy hitters.

60/40 Sativa/Indica

75-85 Days from Sprout

2-4 ounce average

Welcome back to the Secret Owl Society!

The now extinct Alien Tech expressions of Ripley’s OG have been captured in the mother of this cross, and passed on to the offspring, making for an out of this world experience! Tall, stretchy Structure, heavy yields of dense nugs, and a siren song of a perfume, drawing you in for more and more. The Tyrone and Crinkled influence create a mixture of berry and dairy incorporated into a chemmy gin and tonic, mothball, gas funk from the old Ripley’s. These have a heavy sedative effect even though they grow on a sativa structure, and are another great choice for those seeking unique flavors and some added spice to the library.

products.title: Cookie Smasher
products.body_html:
3 feminized autoflower seeds per pack

Sex: Feminized

  • Type: Autoflower

  • Lineage: Crinkled Cookies F2 x Bruce Banner #3 F3 Auto

  • Dominance: Hybrid (60% Sativa, 40% Indica)

  • Flowering Time: 70-80 Days from Sprout

  • Yield: 2-4 ounce average

    Expect medium structured, fast finishing plants with heavy fades and frost for days! These produce gorgeous silvery-white golfball sized nugs that are very dense and potent! This is another heavy hitter thanks to the added oomph of the Bruce Banner #3 Auto. She has a great combination of blues and red berries along with some cookies funk to really bring things together. Perfect for the all day toker that likes to know that they’ve been smoking, for the social smoker that likes to laugh, or for the novice that likes to get uncomfortably high! She isn’t the most forgiving to grow, so take care to baby her early on and she will be sure to take care of you later.

products.title: Chem Candy
products.body_html:
3 feminized autoflower seeds per pack

“This line of regs was developed from my line of Chem 91 x Chemdogging autos that I have been working on for a few years. The F2 generation provided a whole range of flavors that was just too good to ignore! To prevent genetic bottlenecks and to better the available autoflower gene pool I’ve decided to put out a regular auto seeds from a few of my favorite expressions so that they can be worked further or used to create new auto x auto and photo x auto crosses. Out of around 300 seeds I selected 12 plants to move forward, nine females and three males. All three males were resinous and terpy, and every plant had exceptional vigor. These were some of the dankest plants I’ve ever had the pleasure of growing, and the Chem 91 input continues to impress! Chem 91 is a backbone of the photoperiod world, something that has truly stood the test of hype and time, and I hope that these regular offerings will have the same impact on the auto world!

Chem Candy F3 has a that knockout 91 flavor up front, with a fruit candy pop on the back end! Another one to keep for the head stash, these buds have some sort of magnetic properties that make it hard to get your nose out of the jar! If you’re looking or a fruity sweet Chem to work with this is right up your alley!”

products.title: Zamunda Cookies
products.body_html:
Zamaldelica Express F4 x Crinkled Cookies F2

65/35 Sativa/Indica

70-80 Days from Sprout

2-4 ounce average

Welcome back to the Secret Owl Society!

I’ve wanted to cross a personal all time favorite, Zamaldelica Express, with something cookies dominant for a long time in hopes of incorporating the intense sativa effects onto a more modern bud structure. Zamunda Cookies has accomplished just that. While I was a little hesitant to release these at first with the landrace genetics having potential to herm as well as the cookies potential to herm, test grows have proven that to not be an issue! Instead they produce fantastic floral and herb garden flavors mixed with some fruity alcohol and cream scents that make for outstanding anytime smoke with. Plants are medium in size and flowers are dense with plenty of greasy, wet resin to go around. The Crinkled Cookies has tamed the Zamaldelica in all the right ways, making for an easy growing plant that produces lots of flowers. The buds are a nice medium density and should do well for lower airflow environments where density can cause issues. Effects are uplifting, euphoric, but not as clear as the pure Zamaldelica Express. The Crinkled Cookies added some nice body soothing effects without couch lock or drowsiness, making her a great candidate for all day enjoyment!

There will be some phenos that express what I’ve been calling a “blockhead” bud shape on their top cola. This is a trait carried through in all of the Crinkled Cookies crosses from the original Grape Crinkle F4 mom. This tends to bring along a slightly more uplifting effect than her rounder sisters.

The figures above are based upon my own experience and include transplanting from half gallon pots to five gallon pots. I have not pushed them to their full potential and I fully anticipate seeing some higher yields from you guys. Enjoy!

products.title: Pre-98 Episode 1 F4
products.body_html:
3 feminized autoflower seeds per pack

NIGHT OWL SEEDS > PRE 98 EPISODE 1 F4 (PRE 98 BUBBA KUSH CLONE ONLY X (AUTO SKYWALKER X AUTO TRIANGLE KUSH))

ORIGINALS LINE

Welcome to the first iteration of my Bubba Kush auto work, Pre 98 Episode 1!

This project started back in 2016 while I was living with Ronin Gardens. I had acquired quite a few stellar clone only varieties while in Colorado and the Bubba Kush was no exception! She was short and thick with super dense nugs, swollen calyxes, and dark dank smells that the Pre 98 had become synonymous with over the years. Everything about her seemed special from the get go, but the effects are what really sealed the deal for our long term plans together. Since I was already quite familiar with the Auto Skywalker and enjoyed everything about it I decided to use it to lay the autoflowering foundation for this project. Fun fact, the same Auto Skywalker male was used to create the Wizard’s Apprentice (Cheech Wizard from Bodhi Seeds x Auto Skywalker) and Pre 98 Episode 1!

The F1 were consistently Bubba dominant plants. Short and stocky, fat fan leaves, and extremely dense nugs covered in silver resin that put out those famous scents that the Pre 98 is known for, with an added layer of earthy OG from the Skywalker. Since they were all so visually similar and the smells were on point, I pollinated multiple females and selected the next generation after a thorough smoke test. The flower with the most sedative effects was selected and used to move on with the F2 generation.

At the F2 stage things really started to open up in terms of genetic variation (see “Outlier Z F4” below). The majority of the autoflowering plants were exceptional mixes of Bubba and Skywalker. Earthy, herbal, dark scents with the same dinner plate fan leaves and shorter stature. The fan and sugar leaves didn’t get the same dripping levels of frost that some of my other varieties offer, but the flowers themselves were absolutely caked!

I selected my two favorite Bubba dominant plants to move forward with the F3 generation, and let the smoke test be the final deciding factor. They were both great, but one was instantly more relaxing and carried a unique minty type of flavor in addition to the traditional Bubba/Skywalker flavors that I had come to expect through the previous generations. This one was selected to move forward into the F3.

The F3 were truly a pleasure to grow and experience. Easy plants that could take a solid feeding from early on. After their hefty veg stage, transitioning into flower they were already in need of more nutrients than the Roots Organics Lush super soil had to offer! They were supplemented with Biobizz and Canna Bio liquid feeds during flower, and managed to come out extremely dense even with the early issues.

The F3 flowers put out a mixture of herbal, rubber, gassy notes and still carried something mysteriously minty along with them, but the coffee flavor became much less prevalent. Structure, resin, density, effects, they checked all the boxes, but without the overt and instantly recognizable coffee scents of the clone only I didn’t feel quite right using “Bubba” in the name of this cross, so with a new plan of action the name “Pre 98 Episode 1” was decided on.

The Pre 98 Episode 1 are truly fantastic plants and I highly recommend growing them, but in my search for perfection I am going to continue the Bubba work. I hit up my pal Stoned Ninja to get the Pre 98 Bubba Kush clone only back, and will begin working on Pre 98 Episode 2 shortly! By the time you read this the Pre 98 Bubba Kush is already en route or in hand, and the process will begin all over to lock down even more of that traditional old school heavy coffee dank funk using Pre 98 Episode 1 as the pollen donor this time.

I’m hoping to have Episode 2 ready in late 2024 or early 2025, so mark those calendars!

From time I received the clone only, through the creation of the F4 seeds these plants have been grown strictly in super soil, 5 gallon pots, and under LED lighting unless noted otherwise. The figures above are based upon my own experience and include transplanting from half gallon pots to five gallon pots. I have not pushed these to their full potential, but I fully anticipate seeing some extra chunky buds from these. Enjoy!

Feminized Autoflowering

products.title: Chem Fruit - Potion Bottle
products.body_html:
Regular M/F Photoperiod
25 Seeds per bottle

Chem Fruit is a rare evenly balanced hybrid (50% indica/50% sativa) strain created through crossing the classic Chemdawg with the delicious Juicy Fruit strain. The result is a tasty bud with a relaxing and thoughtful high that is perfect for days when you want to kick back with some deep philosophical discussion. Chem Fruit has a sweet fruity berry flavor with a potent chemical kick on each cough-inducing exhale. The smell is very herbal and sweet with a fruity earth overtone that's relatively mellow in nature. The Chem Fruit high hits you pretty quickly once you stop coughing, filling you with a relaxing yet uplifting cerebral high that can be stoney and introspective at times. A sense of awareness and focus will ebb and flow in this state, lending itself to conversation but not to getting any real work done. A mild physical body high will accompany this head high, although it won't do much other than leave you feeling lazy and a little bit lethargic. Thanks to these effects and its low THC level, Chem Fruit is said to be perfect for treating conditions such as chronic pain, depression, chronic stress or anxiety, and chronic fatigue. This bud has lumpy long forest green nugs with lots of long thin dark amber hairs and a thick frost coating of bright white crystal trichomes.

products.title: G Candy  (Auto Reg)
products.body_html:
3 regular autoflower seeds per pack.

Lineage/Genealogy:
G-Chem-O x Chem Candy

I grew both packs from Daz and was blessed with multiple females & males from both packs!
Most of the males were coming from the Chem Candy so I decided to use that for the next chucking.
The results were stunning! Medium to large yields covered in thick trichomes.

"This line of regs was developed from my line of Chem 91 x Chemdogging autos that I have been working on for a few years. To prevent genetic bottlenecks and to better the available autoflower gene pool I've decided to put out a regular auto seeds from a few of my favorite expressions so that they can be worked further or used to create new auto x auto and photo x auto crosses. Out of around 300 seeds I selected 12 plants to move forward, nine females and three males. All three males were resinous and terpy, and every plant had exceptional vigor. These were some of the dankest plants I've ever had the pleasure of growing, and the Chem 91 input continues to impress! Chem 91 is a backbone of the photoperiod world, something that has truly stood the test of hype and time, and I hope that these regular offerings will have the same impact on the auto world!Chem Candy F3 has a that knockout 91 flavor up front, with a fruit candy pop on the back end! products.title: G-Chem-O F2 (Auto Reg)
products.body_html:
3 Regular M/F Autoflower Seeds per pack.

We were blessed to be able to run the G-Chem-O regular autoflower male, back into another selected mother,
giving us a plentiful platter of beans to work with in future runs.
Please follow Daz at Night Owl Seeds. These are from his drop, and we are humbled to run them ourselves.

G-Chemo-O is a ruderalis/indica/sativa variety from Night Owl Seeds and can be cultivated indoors (where the plants will need a flowering time of ±70 days), outdoors and in the greenhouse. Night Owl Seeds' G-Chemo-O is a THC dominant variety and is/was never available as feminized seeds.

"This line of regs was developed from my line of Chem 91 x Chemdogging autos that I have been working on for a few years. The F2 generation provided a whole range of flavors that was just too good to ignore! To prevent genetic bottlenecks and to better the available autoflower gene pool I've decided to put out a regular auto seeds from a few of my favorite expressions so that they can be worked further or used to create new auto x auto and photo x auto crosses. Out of around 300 seeds I selected 12 plants to move forward, nine females and three males. All three males were resinous and terpy, and every plant had exceptional vigor. These were some of the dankest plants I've ever had the pleasure of growing, and the Chem 91 input continues to impress! Chem 91 is a backbone of the photoperiod world, something that has truly stood the test of hype and time, and I hope that these regular offerings will have the same impact on the auto world!G-Chem-O F3 provides that foul halitosis funk that so many crave! Not as garlicky as the actual GMO cut, but definitely similar with it's dad breath stank. If you like the extra pungent （sometimes off-putting） heavy hitters than this one's for you!"

products.title: ChemCandy F2  (Auto Reg)
products.body_html:
3 Regular autoflower seeds per pack.
Lineage: Chem 91 x Chemdogging

I again used the ChemCandy male and pollinated a selected female.

Chem Candy is an automatic flowering ruderalis/indica/sativa variety from Night Owl Seeds and can be cultivated indoors, outdoors and in the greenhouse where the female, autoflowering plants need ±70 days from the seedling to the harvest. Night Owl Seeds' Chem Candy is a THC dominant variety and is/was never available as feminized seeds.

Chem Candy F3 has a that knockout 91 flavor up front, with a fruit candy pop on the back end! Another one to keep for the head stash, these buds have some sort of magnetic properties that make it hard to get your nose out of the jar! If you're looking or a fruity sweet Chem to work with this is right up your alley!"

products.title: Drip Station
products.body_html:
Mother: Greasy Runtz
Father: Scotty 2 Hotty
Family: 50/50 Indica 
Sex: Feminized
Growing Conditions: Multi-topped Bush
Height: Medium/Tall
Flowering Time: 56-63 Days
Yield: Heavy

10 Feminized seeds per pack

Drip Station is an evenly balanced hybrid strain (50% indica/50% sativa) created through crossing the classic Greasy Runtz X Scotty 2 Hotty strains. The perfect super sticky bud for a lazy afternoon, Drip Station is filled with giddy and sociable effects that will have you being the center of attention at any upcoming event. This bud has oversized pepper-shaped olive green nugs with bright purple undertones, thick red-orange hairs and frosty, chunky purple-tinted white crystal trichomes that are practically dripping with sweet, sticky resin. As you pull apart each nugget, aromas of spicy diesel, sour citrus and fruity blueberries are released, intensifying in sweetness the more that you toke. The flavor is of sweet fruity blueberries and sour citrusy lemon, all wrapped up with a pleasantly creamy taste. The Drip Station high will have both mind and body feeling sticky in all of the right ways, with soothing and lifted effects that last for hours on end. You'll find your mind locked into a state of pure euphoria that has you feeling giddy, giggly and like you can take on the world. A soothing body high comes next, locking you to the couch and leaving you feeling fully relaxed. Combined with its high 21-29% average THC level, these effects give Drip Station an edge in treating chronic stress or anxiety, anorexia, depression or mood swings and bipolar disorder.

products.title: Sweat Helmet
products.body_html:
Mother: Greasy Runtz
Father: Sunset Sherbet 
Family: 20/80 Indica 
Sex: Feminized
Growing Conditions: Multi-topped Bush
Height: Medium/Tall
Flowering Time: 56-63 Days
Yield: Heavy

10 Regular Seeds per Pack

Sweat Helmet is an indica dominant hybrid strain (80% indica/20% sativa) created through crossing the potent Sunset Sherbet X Grease Monkey strains. Don't let the name of this bud scare you off – you won't be sweating (or really feeling much of anything at all) with Sweat Helmet. The high settles in almost as soon as you exhale, providing your mind with much-needed sweet relief that has you feeling euphoric with a touch of focus. A lightly arousing physical high comes next, washing over you and leaving you feeling fully relaxed from head to toe, completely calm and at ease. This combination will turn sedative, so it's best to be ready for a long and peaceful nap! With these effects and its super high 24-26% average THC level, Sweat Helmet is often chosen to treat conditions such as chronic pain, depression, nausea or appetite loss, insomnia, nightmares and narcolepsy. This bud has a sweet and sugary sour citrus flavor with a light touch of pungency. The aroma is heavy and dank with a pungent diesel overtone that's slightly sweet and accented by sour citrus. Sweat Helmet buds have small dense dark olive green nugs with deep amber hairs and a frosty, thick coating of matching, milky amber crystal trichomes.

products.title: Monkey Berries
products.body_html:
Mother: Strawberries & Cream 
Father: Grease Monkey 
Family: 40/60 Indica 
Sex: Regular
Growing Conditions: Multi-Topped Bush
Height: Medium/Tall
Flowering Time: 56-63 Days
Yield: Heavy

10 Regular Seeds per Pack

Monkey Berries, also known as “Monkey Berry,” is a slightly indica dominant hybrid strain (60% indica/40% sativa) created through crossing the delicious Strawberries & Cream X Grease Monkey strains. When it comes to the flavor of this bud, the name says it all. Monkey Berries packs a super delicious fruity berry flavor that's filled with blueberries, raspberries and strawberries galore. The aroma takes a spicier turn, with a fruity strawberry overtone that's accented by spicy black pepper and creamy blueberries. The Monkey Berries high is just as delicious, with soothing full-bodied effects that will lift your spirits and help your body to settle with each and every toke. You'll feel your mind activated with an energetic sense that's clear-headed and filled with focus. At the same time, your body will drop off into a super relaxed state that quickly turns sedative and stoney before you even realize what's happening. Thanks to these effects and its high 14-19% average THC level, Monkey Berries is often chosen to treat those patients suffering from conditions such as chronic pain, depression, chronic fatigue, ADD or ADHD, nausea or appetite loss and chronic stress. This bud has fluffy heart-shaped olive green nugs with reddish-orange hairs and a coating of purple-tinted white crystal trichomes.
